login.subtitleInvite: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.

signup.subtitleInvite: Verify your email, then accept the invitation to join your team.
signup.subtitleDefault: Get started with CRM Template for WhatsApp
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to <email></email>. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: We've sent a password reset link to <email></email>. Please check your inbox.

notFound.title: Invite not found
notFound.body: This link doesn't match a valid invitation. Double-check the URL or ask the person who invited you to send a new one.

used.title: Invite already used
used.body: This invitation has already been accepted. If that wasn't you, ask the account admin to send a fresh link.

expired.title: Invite expired
expired.body: This invitation has expired. Ask the account admin to send a new one — they take a few seconds to generate.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.body: We couldn't verify this invitation right now. Try refreshing the page in a moment.

join.joinAs: You'll join as <role></role>. Link valid until {date}.
join.acceptNote: Accepting moves your login into <account></account>. Your empty personal account from signup will be cleaned up.

conflict.title: Can't join {accountName} with this account
conflict.body: To join <account></account>, sign out and sign up again with a different email address. The invite link stays valid as long as it hasn't expired.
conflict.signOutAndUseDifferentEmail: Sign out & use a different email
conflict.defaultMessage: You are already in another account. Sign in with a different email to join this one.

toast.signOutFailed: Could not sign out. Try refreshing the page.
